element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Player learns directional skating and puck handling in early matches

element_introduction_order.element: Shooting mechanics (standard shot, slap shot, fake shot)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Progressive difficulty levels (Junior/NHL/NHL Pro) scale shot accuracy and timing windows
Used in conjunction with positioning to set up scoring opportunities
Player learns timing and positioning to disrupt opponent offense

element_introduction_order.element: Penalty system (tripping, cross-checking, slashing, roughing, hooking, interference, icing, offsides)
element_introduction_order.first_appears: Early gameplay when infractions are committed
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Penalties accumulate across season; discipline affects team performance
Roster management affects fatigue and performance across 20-minute periods

element_introduction_order.first_appears: Implicitly during first match (referenced by player number positioning)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Team selection and lineup decisions become strategic layer in Season/Playoff modes

element_introduction_order.element: Advanced shot tactics (corner-aimed shots, dump-and-chase over goalie)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Expert-level exploitation of game mechanics in NHL Pro difficulty

typical_relief_triggers: Clearing the puck from defensive zone
Period end break with sportscaster summary
typical_tension_triggers: Power play situation (opponent has numerical advantage)
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Real-time pacing mimics ice hockey flow: alternating offensive/defensive possessions with natural momentum shifts; period breaks provide narrative relief via sportscaster commentary

difficulty_curve.early_game: Junior difficulty allows player to learn mechanics with forgiving shot windows and opponent AI; Exhibition mode provides low-stakes practice
difficulty_curve.mid_game: NHL difficulty increases shot accuracy requirements and opponent competency; Season mode introduces multi-game progression and cumulative fatigue
difficulty_curve.late_game: NHL Pro difficulty and Best-of-Seven Series format intensify competitive pressure; player attributes become critical differentiators; goaltending becomes decision point
notable_spikes: Transition from Junior to NHL difficulty (shot timing precision)
Final Stanley Cup match (opponent selected at season end)

notable_level_patterns.description: Each game divides into discrete 5/10/20-minute periods with stat summaries and relief breaks; penalty and line-change systems reset between periods
Exhibition → Season (multi-team schedule) → Playoff bracket (Best-of-Seven Series); cumulative statistics and team fatigue create meta-progression
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Season mode (26 NHL teams across multiple matches)

notable_level_patterns.description: Pseudo-3D angled viewpoint keeps puck and center-ice action centered; hardware feature aids spatial awareness and shooting angle clarity
